international_news.summary: A record **June** heatwave in **Europe** has led to **40** drowning deaths in **France**, prompting **France** to restrict public drinking. The continent is experiencing its **second** 'heat-dome driven furnace' in **two** months, with **Euronews** noting 'El Niño is a distraction' from **Europe** becoming a deadly heat trap.

**Ukraine** is increasing the cost of war for **Russia**, testing **Putin's** resolve. **Russia** is considering a diesel export ban and fuel imports due to **Ukrainian** strikes, with **Crimea** restricting public life. Fuel shortages and 'oil rain' are affecting **Moscow**, leading **Moscow** to lift tanker entry permits to supply gas stations, as reported by **Meduza**.

A new **Pew** global survey shows overwhelmingly negative reviews for **Trump** and the **US**, with **Forbes** reporting **Trump's** international approval rating at **23%**. Fewer nations view the **U.S.** as a reliable partner, and **Trump's** international approval ratings have plummeted, even among far-right groups, according to **The Globe and Mail**.

**Ten** years post-Brexit, its economic impact is clearer, with analysts from **The New York Times** stating it has cost the **UK** growth. **Worcestershire** firms report being poorer, while **Larry Elliott** of **The Guardian** maintains the decision to leave the **European Union** was correct.

A **U.N.** report states **Israeli** killings of **Gaza** children post-truce amount to genocide, with an independent commission finding **Israel** deliberately targeting **Palestinian** children. **The Guardian**, **UN News**, **BBC**, and **The Jerusalem Post** corroborate these claims of genocide and atrocity crimes.

Protests in **Albania** against **Jared Kushner-backed** luxury resort plans have escalated into an anti-corruption movement, with anger directed at the government. **NPR** notes the real estate deal's ties to **Jared Kushner** and **Ivanka Trump**, while **Albania's PM** denies being 'the Godfather' amidst the discontent.

The **EU** hosted **Taliban** officials in **Brussels** for the **first** time to discuss migration and speed up **Afghan** deportations, despite fierce criticism. The **Taliban** used the visit to push for consular access in **Europe**, as reported by **Reuters**, **Al Jazeera**, **Euractiv**, and **The Guardian**.

**Andy Burnham** is preparing for a **UK Labour** leadership contest, potentially a 'coronation,' despite polls showing voters wanted **Starmer** gone but not an immediate **Burnham** coronation. **The Guardian** notes his borrowing plans clash with fiscal realities, and **Reuters** discusses his 'Manchesterism' vision.
**Belgian Royal Tiaras** were prominently featured at tonight’s **Japanese State Banquet**, as highlighted by **The Court Jeweller**.

**Iran** announced successful technical talks with the **US** in **Switzerland**, with **Al Jazeera** reporting an agreement on a roadmap for a final deal and plans to end military operations in **Lebanon**. The **US** waived **Iran** sanctions after talks, despite **Trump's** disruptions, as noted by **The New York Times** and **PBS**.

domestic_news.summary: A **Pune** businessman's fall at **Lohagad Fort** became a murder probe after a **CCTV** clue showed him wearing a hoodie in **33°C** heat. His fiancée allegedly sabotaged a **Bali** trip and stole his passport to carry out the murder plan, later posting 'my heart found its home,' weeks before pushing him, according to **Moneycontrol.com**.

The **U.S. Senate** approved a **War Powers** resolution, a **first**, rebuking **Trump** over the **Iran** conflict and directing him to end hostilities. **The Hindu** and **WSJ** reported this move, with **Telegraph India** noting the Senate's defiance against 'Operation Epic Failure'.

A **10-year-old** girl's last words, 'Papa Mujhe Bacha Lo,' were heard before she was kidnapped, raped, and killed in **Delhi**. A cab driver was arrested for abducting her from a roadside footpath, leading to heart-rending scenes at her cremation, as reported by **NDTV**, **The Hindu**, and **Moneycontrol.com**.

**PM Modi** received a call from the **Qatar Emir** after **12 Indians** were killed in a **Ras Laffan** gas plant blast, thanking him for condolences. **Reuters** reported **13** dead and dozens injured, with **The Hindu** noting **3** persons from **T.N.** among the deceased.

In **Ayodhya**, 'Sangh Parivar vs Sangh Parivar' erupted over **Ram temple** fund 'theft' charges. An **SIT** submitted a preliminary report to the **U.P.** government, with a **2020** audit having predicted a **Rs 3,500 crore** cash donation mess without **SOP**, according to **The Indian Express**.

A new book claims **JD Vance** proposed deploying **Indian** troops in **Ukraine**, but **Trump** rejected it, stating 'Indians won't do that.' **Trump** also laughed off the plan, which suggested **Indian** and **Saudi** troops for a peacekeeper role, as reported by **Hindustan Times** and **NDTV**.

**Monsoon** rains inundated low-lying areas and disrupted trains in **Mumbai**, with **200 mm** of rain in **24** hours causing widespread flooding. A wall collapsed, trees were uprooted, and a car was crushed, leading to a red alert and the closure of the **Andheri** underpass, as per **The Hindu** and **NDTV**.

Wedding preparations turned into a funeral in **Lucknow** after a fire killed an engaged couple. An **SIT** inspected the site, while **Congress** alleged **Uttar Pradesh** government negligence, with a victim's last call being 'Save me!' from the blaze-hit building, according to **NDTV** and **The Hindu**.

**CM Vijay** told a 'short story' in the **Assembly**, prompting **Udhayanidhi Stalin** to say the House turned into a cinema. **MK Stalin** slammed **Tamil Nadu CM Vijay's** 'filmy' speech, while **CM Vijay** stated he is 'ideologically opposed to **BJP**' but works with the **Union** government, as reported by **The Hindu** and **NDTV**.

**Congress** demanded **MP CM Mohan Yadav's** resignation and an independent probe into land bought by his family, alleging 'plunder' in **Ujjain** land deals. The **BJP** called the allegations baseless, while **Akhilesh** saw a 'BJP plot' to topple **3** CMs, according to **The Indian Express** and **The Hindu**.

business_news.summary: **Dow**, **S&P 500**, and **Nasdaq** futures slipped due to growing doubts about the **AI** trade, leading to a global tech sell-off. **Nasdaq** closed **2%** lower, led by **Micron**, as concerns over **AI** spending and valuations rattled markets, as reported by **Yahoo Finance** and **CNBC**.

**Google-parent Alphabet** will replace **Verizon** in the **Dow Jones Industrial Average**, pivoting the index towards tech. **Alphabet's** shares rose on the news, marking a significant reshuffle for the **Dow**, as reported by **WSJ** and **CNBC**.

**Asian** stocks are set to extend an **AI** chip-fueled selloff, with stock futures mixed ahead of **Micron** earnings. The **Kospi** jumped over **3%** in choppy trade, while traders debate the extent of the tech sell-off, as reported by **Bloomberg.com** and **CNBC**.

**Elon Musk** lost his trillionaire status as **SpaceX** stock dipped below its **$150** debut price before rebounding, causing his net worth to fall by **$240 billion**, equivalent to **IBM's** value. This stumble follows **SpaceX's** blockbuster **IPO**, as reported by **Business Insider** and **Fortune**.

**FedEx** posted strong earnings in its last quarter, with revenue rising due to growth in package yields and volume in its freight business. Despite a margin drop, the company eyes an **11%** rise in **2026** revenue but warns on inflation and trade turmoil, as reported by **CNBC** and **Reuters**.

A **Chinese** supercomputer, **LineShine**, leapfrogged the best **US** machines to be ranked the world’s fastest, taking the supercomputer crown from the **U.S.** for the **first** time since **2017**. This surprise was reported by **The Guardian**, **The New York Times**, and **Al Jazeera**.

**Agility**, maker of humanlike robots, is set to go public in a **$2.5 billion SPAC** deal, with **OregonLive.com** confirming the **Oregon** robotics company's valuation. This move will list **Agility Robotics** through a **Churchill Capital** deal, as reported by **WSJ** and **mezha.net**.

**Alphabet** stock extended losses, experiencing its worst day in over a year, as **Wall Street** questioned its status as an **AI** winner. Concerns arose after high-profile exits and aggressive talent poaching by **OpenAI** and **Anthropic**, leading to **Google's** significant stock drop, as reported by **Barron's** and **CNBC**.

**Morgan Stanley** capped its private credit fund after an **11.6%** exit request, limiting redemptions to **5%** due to rising pullout requests. This move by **Morgan Stanley BDC** was reported by **Bloomberg.com** and **Reuters**.

**Amazon** announced over **125** of the best **Prime Day 2026** deals across tech, home, beauty, and **Amazon** devices, with **CNET** highlighting **100+** deals under **$50**. **The New York Times** and **NBC News** are tracking real-time Lightning Deals.

technology_news.summary: **Prime Day** deals are live, offering tech sales from **Apple**, **Sony**, **Bose**, and **Anker** for up to **54%** off, including deep discounts on headphones and earbuds like **AirPods**. **Yahoo Tech** and **Mashable** highlight these early deals.

For **Prime Day**, **100-inch Hisense TVs** are **$2,000** off, with **USA Today** and **WIRED** highlighting the **Hisense Art TV** at half price. Deals are also available on **TCL** and **Samsung** **4K TVs**, as reported by **Mashable** and **The Verge**.

**Valve** confirmed the **Steam Machine** will cost over **$1,000**, with prices ranging from **$1,050** to **$1,430**, despite an initial target of around **$750**. Analysts, including **GamesIndustry.biz**, predict it will be a niche device, as reported by **PCMag** and **Forbes**.

**Prime Day** mobile tech deals include savings of up to **$970** on **MacBooks** and **Windows PCs**, with **Amazon** drastically dropping prices on top-tested laptops. **Liliputing**, **Mashable**, and **PCMag** highlight these deals, including gaming laptops from **Dell**, **Alienware**, **MSI**, and **ROG**.

**Amazon** is offering significant **Prime Day** deals on **Garmin** smartwatches, with the new **Fenix 8 Pro** dropping to a record low and other rugged models up to **50%** off or **$500** off. **Gizmodo** and **ZDNET** report these deals, noting the **Fenix 8** is worth buying.

**Chrome Autofill** is rolling out deeper **Google Wallet** integration, allowing **Chrome** on mobile to fill out forms using data from **Google Wallet**, including passport and license information. **9to5Google** and **blog.google** detail this advanced capability.

**Prime Day Google Pixel 10** deals are live, offering up to **$400** off the **Pixel 10** series, with the **10a** at a new all-time low, starting from **$290**. Deals also include the **Pixel Watch 4** and **Galaxy S26** for **$350** off, as reported by **9to5Toys** and **9to5Google**.

**Star Wars: Galactic Racer** is praised for its physics-based destructive tech, high-speed **DNA**, and surprisingly good roguelike story mode, drawing comparisons to **Burnout**. **Engadget** and **Game Informer** highlight its engaging gameplay despite the branding.

The **RayNeo Air 4 Pro XR Glasses** are available at a new low price for **Prime Day**, with **ZDNET** noting them as the best-selling **XR** glasses on **Amazon**. These **Switch 2-compatible** glasses are up to **78%** off, making them a clear budget winner at **$240**, as reported by **Nintendo Life** and **PCMag**.

**Microsoft** quietly launched **8GB RAM** models of the **Surface Pro** and **Surface Laptop** to combat skyrocketing prices, despite concerns about the **8GB RAM** problem. The revised **Surface Laptop** is cheaper but potentially worse, with new models going 'all-in' on **Snapdragon X2**, as reported by **Windows Central** and **PCWorld**.

sports_news.summary: The **2026 NBA Draft** saw **AJ Dybantsa** selected **No. 1** by the **Wizards**, earning an **A+** grade from **Yahoo Sports**. **Darryn Peterson** and **Cameron Boozer** were also top picks, with **three Wolverines** taken in the **first 12** picks, as reported by **ESPN** and **CBS Sports**.

**England** fans lamented a 'trash' **scoreless draw** against **Ghana** in the **World Cup**, exposing worries about their **World Cup** run. **England** was held goalless in their **second** game, with questions raised about shooting frequency and the performance of **Jordan Pickford** and **Ezri Konsa**, as reported by **BBC** and **ESPN**.

The **NFL** declined to hold a **2026 supplemental draft**, deeming **Brendan Sorsby's** issues 'too significant,' pausing his **NFL** path. This decision, which **Jeffrey Kessler** argues violates the **CBA**, was a scathing lesson in accountability, as reported by **USA Today** and **ESPN**.

Former **UFC** fighter **Dustin Poirier** was arrested for public intoxication at **Atlanta Airport**, with video showing erratic, threatening behavior after being blocked from a **Delta** flight. **ESPN** and **Yahoo Sports** reported his profanity-laced dispute with police.

**Messi** and **Mbappé** are dominating the **World Cup** with dazzling, history-making goals, leading the race for the **2026 World Cup** golden boot alongside **Haaland** and **Kane**. **Messi** made history as an all-time top scorer, as reported by **AP News** and **FOX Sports**.

**Colombia** defeated **DR Congo 1-0** in the **2026 World Cup**, with **Daniel Munoz** scoring his **second** goal of the tournament, sending **Colombia** into the last **32** (knockouts). **The Guardian** and **BBC** reported **Munoz** breaking **DR Congo's** resistance.

The **Warriors** kept their draft pick, selecting **Michigan's Yaxel Lendeborg No. 11** overall in the **2026 NBA draft**. **Lendeborg**, a former **Cavs** fan who 'used to hate **Steph Curry**,' had an emotional moment hugging his mom with **Stage 4 Cancer**, as reported by **SFGATE** and **People.com**.

**Jaylen Brown** is a 'big part' of the **Celtics**, but after a failed pursuit of **Giannis**, trade destinations are being discussed for the **Celtics** star. **CBS Sports** and **ESPN** report on possible landing spots and the potential for a **Jaylen Brown** problem, with **Mannix** noting interest in **Evan Mobley**.

The **Grizzlies** nabbed **Duke's Cameron Boozer** at **No. 3** in the **NBA draft**, with his father, former **NBA All-Star Carlos Boozer**, filled with joy. Scouts and coaches discussed **Cameron Boozer** as a top big prospect, with some suggesting he should have been drafted **No. 1**, as reported by **ESPN** and **Yahoo Sports**.

**Portugal's Cristiano Ronaldo** shook off doubters, scoring **2** goals after a sluggish start in the **World Cup**, leading **Portugal** to a **5-0** rout of **Uzbekistan**. He ended his goal drought and became the **first** to score at **6 World Cups**, setting a record **Lionel Messi** won't break, as reported by **NPR** and **ESPN**.

user_interest.summary: An anime adaptation of **Fool Night** has been announced as a collaboration between **Sunrise** and **SHAFT**, as reported by **Crunchyroll**.
Fans speculate that **Wes Bennett** has been cast in 'Better Than The Movies', as reported by **Newsweek**.
**Netflix** unveiled first looks at the **'One Piece'** anime and **'Blue Eye Samurai' Season 2** at the **Annecy Showcase**, as reported by **The Hollywood Reporter** and **IMDb**.
**Na Hong-Jin** will receive the **Action Cinema Award** as **NYAFF** unveils the **North American Premiere** of **'Hope'**, as reported by **Variety**.
**Hololive production** will offer a summer experience at **Anime NYC 2026**, as announced on the **Hololive** official website.
**Tom Cruise** is celebrating **46** years in movies with a retrospective trailer and new digger footage, as reported by **IMDb**.
**Netflix** unveiled its upcoming anime slate at the **Annecy Festival**, as reported by **About Netflix**.
**Tom Cruise** is celebrating **46** years in cinema with a tantalizing teaser for his latest movie, as reported by **empireonline.com**.
**Netflix's 'Fool Night'** teaser successfully captured the manga's cold, unsettling vibe, as reported by **Hypebeast**.
A new trailer for **Tom Cruise's** next movie is also a trailer for all **Tom Cruise** movies, as reported by **Polygon.com**.
As its anime viewership skyrockets, **Netflix** unveiled **'Fool Night'** and more of **'The One Piece'** at **Annecy**, as reported by **Variety**.
**TVLine** highlighted 'Not Suitable For Work Finale' and the **NBA Draft** as things to watch on Tuesday.
**Netflix** unveiled first images of **'Fool Night'**, its new anime series, as reported by **Yahoo**.
**Heartstopper Forever** starts the party with new photos of the farewell film, as announced by **Netflix**.
**Netflix** unveiled first looks at the **'One Piece'** anime and **'Blue Eye Samurai' Season 2** at the **Annecy Showcase**, as reported by **IMDb**.

weather.summary: Good morning, Delhi! Get ready for another scorching day in Connaught Place. Temperatures are already soaring to a blistering **38.79°C** under a clear, unyielding sky. With humidity at a dry **25%**, conditions will feel intensely hot. Remember to stay hydrated and seek shade as the day progresses.

finance.overview: The market closed on a high note, with all major indices showing strong gains. The **NIFTY 50** climbed **+0.74%** to **23999.30**, while the **BSE SENSEX** surged **+1.00%** to **76963.90**. Leading the charge was the **NIFTY BANK**, which saw an impressive rise of **+1.58%** to **58086.60**. Our watchlist stocks largely mirrored this positive sentiment. Financial giants **ICICIBANK.NS** led the pack with a robust **+2.75%** gain, followed closely by **INFY.NS** at **+1.93%** and **HDFCBANK.NS** at **+1.91%**. Tech major **TCS.NS** also performed well, up **+1.71%**. Even **RELIANCE.NS**, while more modest, ended the day in positive territory, rising **+0.24%**. Overall, it was a day of broad-based gains, particularly strong in the banking and IT sectors.
